description: This is a False Colour Infrared (FCIR) satellite or aerial image displaying an agricultural landscape. Actively photosynthesising vegetation, such as tree plantations (likely olive groves) arranged in regular grids, appears in deep red hues. Areas of bare soil or senescent vegetation are shown in lighter, yellowish-brown tones. A large, dark purplish-red area is visible in the bottom-left, possibly indicating a water body or dense, darker vegetation. A prominent light blue polygon boundary delineates a specific area of interest, encompassing multiple agricultural fields and land parcels. No scale bar, compass, legend, or reference year is visible.
